channel.title: Frontion News Headlines
channel.description: Breaking geopolitical news curated from Tier 1 sources

item.title: 🇪🇺 Eurozone Inflation Hits 3% as Iran War Oil Shock Spreads
item.description: Surging oil prices from the Iran conflict pushed eurozone inflation to 3% in April, while economic growth continued to underperform expectations.

item.title: 🇬🇧 UK Declares Antisemitism Emergency After Double Stabbing Attack
item.description: British government announces millions in new funding to combat antisemitism following a stabbing incident, labeling the situation an emergency.

item.title: 🇻🇪 First US-Venezuela Commercial Flight in 7 Years Set to Land in Caracas
item.description: Direct commercial flights between the United States and Venezuela resume after a seven-year hiatus, marking a significant diplomatic development.

item.title: 📰 Media Organizations Demand Israel Allow Foreign Journalists into Gaza
item.description: Leaders of major media companies urge Israel to lift its ban on independent foreign journalist access to Gaza, citing press freedom concerns.

item.title: 🇺🇸 Powell Closes Eight Years at Fed Helm With Integrity Focus
item.description: Jerome Powell concludes eight-year tenure as Fed Chair spanning three administrations, 66 rate meetings, a pandemic, and criminal investigations.

item.title: 🇺🇦 Ukraine Commander Orders Mandatory 2-Month Rotation for Frontline Troops
item.description: General Syrskyi ordered mandatory rotation for soldiers after 2 months on the front lines, addressing reports of troops spending over 100 days in position without relief due to manpower shortages and deadly drone-saturated battlefields.

item.title: ✈️ Middle East Airlines See 60% Drop in Demand as Iran War Disrupts Airspace
item.description: IATA reports Middle Eastern carriers suffered a 60.8% year-on-year decline in demand due to the US-Israel-Iran war closing regional airspace, with capacity down 56.9%. Only Oman and Saudi west coast routes remain operational.

item.title: 🇵🇰 Pakistan Opens Six Land Corridors to Iran, Undermining US Blockade
item.description: Pakistan formalized six overland transit routes to Iran under the Transit of Goods Order 2026, enabling cargo to bypass the US naval blockade of the Strait of Hormuz. Analysts call it a "double game" as Islamabad simultaneously hosts US-Iran talks.

item.title: 🛢️ Wall Street Giants Compete for Shell's $15B LNG Canada Stake
item.description: KKR, Apollo, and Blackstone are vying for a portion of Shell's 40% stake in the $40 billion LNG Canada project, North America's first Pacific LNG export facility. The asset sale follows Shell's $16.4B acquisition of ARC Resources.

item.title: 🛢️ Oil Surges to Highest Since 2022 as US Military Prepares New Iran Strike Plans
item.description: Brent crude jumped nearly 7% to over $126 per barrel after reports that US Central Command has prepared plans for "short and powerful" strikes on Iran. The Strait of Hormuz remains effectively closed, disrupting about a fifth of global energy supplies.

item.title: 🏛️ Supreme Court Weakens Voting Rights Act in Louisiana Redistricting Case
item.description: The Supreme Court struck down a majority-Black congressional district in Louisiana in a 6-3 ruling, finding it relied too heavily on race. The decision could affect nearly 70 congressional districts protected under Section 2 and reshape the 2028 electoral map.

item.title: 🇩🇪 Trump Considers Reducing US Troops in Germany After Merz Criticism
item.description: President Trump announced he is "studying" whether to reduce the more than 36,000 US troops stationed in Germany. The move follows German Chancellor Merz criticism that the US had been "humiliated" by Iranian negotiators in the ongoing conflict.

item.title: 🇲🇽 US Indicts 10 Mexican Officials Including Sinaloa Governor for Drug Trafficking
item.description: Federal prosecutors in New York charged Sinaloa Governor Ruben Rocha Moya and nine other Mexican officials with aiding the Sinaloa Cartel. The indictment alleges they protected cartel leaders, provided law enforcement intel, and received millions in drug money.

item.title: 🛢️ Brent crude hits 4-year high as US-Iran war deadlock keeps supply off market
item.description: Oil prices surged to a four-year high on concerns that the ongoing US-Iran conflict could escalate further, leading to prolonged supply disruptions from the Middle East.

item.title: 🇨🇳🇹🇼 Taiwan tops Beijing agenda for Trump-Xi summit
item.description: The upcoming Trump-Xi meeting in mid-May will have profound implications for Taiwans 23 million people, with the islands status expected to dominate discussions.

item.title: 🇪🇺💰 ECB to hold rates steady but keep hikes on table amid Iran war inflation
item.description: The European Central Bank will keep interest rates unchanged but signal that a rate hike may be needed soon to combat energy-driven price surges from the Middle East conflict.

item.title: 🇺🇸💵 Fed holds rates steady in most divided vote since 1992
item.description: The Federal Reserve kept its policy rate unchanged in what is likely Jay Powells last meeting as chair, with the board showing its deepest divisions in over three decades over inflation concerns.

item.title: 🇨🇳✈️ Chinese military experts analyze how Iran detected and damaged US F-35 stealth jet
item.description: SCMP reports Chinese military analysts have mapped out how Iranian air defenses were able to detect and damage an F-35 stealth fighter during combat operations, potentially revealing vulnerabilities in the advanced aircraft.

item.title: 🇧🇾🇷🇺 Belarus bars Russian conscripts from leaving country as Ukraine war continues
item.description: Minsk has prohibited conscripted Russian soldiers and those from occupied Ukrainian territories from leaving the country, potentially preventing escape from military service.

item.title: 🛢️ Iran War Exposes Big Oil Transatlantic Divide
item.description: European oil majors posted strong first-quarter profits from trading gains as the Iran war disrupted supply chains, highlighting how shifting barrels can trump pumping them. The conflict has created different opportunities for European traders vs American drillers.

item.title: 🇱🇧 Hezbollah Deploys Fiber-Optic Drones Against Israel
item.description: Hezbollah has begun using fiber-optic controlled drones that evade electronic jamming, a technology widely used in the Ukraine war. The thin cable connecting operators directly to drones makes them impossible to electronically jam.

item.title: 🇨🇳 China Ramps Up Trade Leverage Before Trump-Xi Summit
item.description: Beijing announced new trade rules that could punish foreign companies for reducing reliance on Chinese supply chains, alarming US businesses weeks before the Trump-Xi summit. Analysts say this could undercut American efforts to reduce supply chain dependence on China.

item.title: 🇲🇱🇷🇺⚔️ Mali Setbacks Challenge Russian Influence in Africa
item.description: Reversals suffered by Mali's Moscow-backed military government have dented Russia's image as a security guarantor in Africa and threaten its strategic and mineral interests on the continent.

item.title: 🇨🇳💻🤖 DeepSeek Bets on Huawei as China Seeks to Replace Nvidia
item.description: Chinese AI startup DeepSeek has aligned with Huawei as Beijing pushes to end reliance on Western technology, signaling a major shift in China's AI semiconductor strategy.

item.title: 🇦🇪🛢️🏛️ UAE Reviews Multilateral Ties After OPEC Exit
item.description: The United Arab Emirates is reassessing its role across multilateral organizations following its withdrawal from OPEC, but is not considering further departures, a UAE official said.
